name: ethInjectPacket
title: ethInjectPacket
description: Transmits an Ethernet packet by a specific ethernetPort defined in <packet>. Allows to output a frame not only on a simulation port like output, but on a physical port as well e.g. for error injection.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: transmit direction from viewpoint of the connected segment: <rx> or <0> to send from a simulated port (into the connected segment) in real mode <tx> or <1> to send from a physical measurement port (away from the connected segment) in real mode in simulated mode use <tx> or <rx> (respectively <0> or <1>) to send from simulated ports either into the connected segment (rx) or away from the connected segment (tx).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
